mapper.select: select g.id, g.title, g.description, g.cover_image, m.nickname as member_nickname, g.work_count, g.like_count, g.view_count, g.created_datetime from tbl_gallery g left join tbl_member m on g.member_id = m.id where g.member_id = #{memberId} and g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status != 'DELETED' order by g.created_datetime desc, g.id desc
select member_id from tbl_gallery where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
mapper.update: update tbl_gallery set title = #{gallery.title}, description = #{gallery.description}, cover_image = coalesce(#{gallery.coverImage}, cover_image), allow_comment = coalesce(#{gallery.allowComment}, allow_comment), show_similar = coalesce(#{gallery.showSimilar}, show_similar), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
update tbl_gallery set status = 'DELETED', deleted_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.select: select gallery_id from tbl_gallery_work where work_id = #{workId} order by id asc limit 1
